name: node-skills
description: Node.js development skills by Matteo Collina covering Fastify, Node.js best practices, TypeScript, OAuth, linting, and more

plugins.name: node
plugins.description: Best practices for Node.js development with TypeScript, covering type stripping, async patterns, error handling, streams, modules, testing, performance, caching, logging, and graceful shutdown

plugins.name: fastify
plugins.description: Guides development of Fastify Node.js backend servers and REST APIs using TypeScript or JavaScript, covering routes, plugins, JSON Schema validation, error handling, authentication, CORS, WebSockets, and deployment

plugins.name: nodejs-core
plugins.description: Deep Node.js internals expertise: C++ addons, N-API/node-addon-api bindings, V8 optimization, libuv event loop, native memory debugging, and node-gyp build system

plugins.name: typescript-magician
plugins.description: TypeScript wizard specializing in complex generics, conditional types, mapped types, type guards, branded types, and eliminating any types from codebases

plugins.name: oauth
plugins.description: Implements OAuth 2.0/2.1 authorization flows in Fastify applications: authorization code with PKCE, client credentials, device flow, refresh token rotation, JWT validation, and token introspection

plugins.name: linting-neostandard-eslint9
plugins.description: Configures ESLint v9 flat config and neostandard for JavaScript and TypeScript projects, including migration from legacy .eslintrc files and CI/pre-commit integration

plugins.name: octocat
plugins.description: Git and GitHub wizard using the gh CLI for pull requests, issues, branching, merging, rebasing, merge conflict resolution, GitHub Actions workflows, and repository management

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Creates, structures, and reviews technical documentation following the Diátaxis framework (tutorials, how-to guides, reference, and explanation pages)

plugins.name: init
plugins.description: Creates, updates, or optimizes an AGENTS.md file for a repository with minimal, high-signal instructions covering non-discoverable conventions, tooling quirks, and project-specific rules

plugins.name: snipgrapher
plugins.description: Configures and uses snipgrapher to generate polished syntax-highlighted code snippet images (PNG, SVG, WebP) with custom themes, profiles, batch jobs, and watch mode
